{{Infobox concept
| name = Path of the White Fox
| introduced = cradle-01-unsouled
}}

''See also: [[Path of the White Fox Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Path]] of the [[White Fox]] is a sacred art characterized by the use of light and dream-based [[madra]]. It was established by [[Elder Whisper]], a founding member of the [[Wei clan]], who used its influence to assimilate various lesser clans. While it is the most prevalent [[Path]] within the [[Wei clan]], it is frequently utilized by non-combatants such as messengers, artists, and teachers due to its specialized nature. The [[Path]] is also noted for its utility in communication, as it excels at transmitting messages across [[Wei territory]]. Technically, the [[Path]] functions by deceiving the senses through illusions that can manipulate sight, sound, and even smell. Its techniques include [[Forger]] abilities like the [[Fox Mirror]] to create convincing images, [[Striker]] moves such as foxfire, and [[Enforcer techniques]] like the [[Foxtail]], which blurs a practitioner's movements to make them appear wavy and uncertain. At higher levels, the [[Path]] utilizes [[Ruler techniques]] that directly impact an opponent's mind and eyes to force them to perceive illusions as reality. Despite its deceptive strengths, the [[Path]] is often noted for a lack of raw offensive power and physical defense, frequently requiring supplementary tools or techniques to compensate for these weaknesses.}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Path]] of the [[White Fox]] is the most common discipline practiced within the [[Wei clan]], followed by individuals such as Sairus. This path focuses on cultivating aspects of light and dreams to produce [[madra]] that twists sound, deceives the senses, and creates disorienting illusions. Practitioners may use goldsteel to gather light-aspect [[vital aura]] or utilize the [[White Fox boundary formation]] for their training. While [[Lindon]] secured a copy of the path through a deal with the [[First Elder]], rumors persist that the clan's leader may even know its [[Ruler technique]]. Ultimately, those following this discipline benefit from superior training and strength compared to wild practitioners who lack large family support.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Path of the White Fox]] is a discipline followed by many in the [[Wei clan]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c2">''Unsouled'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Path of the White Fox]] is the most common [[Path]] in the [[Wei clan]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c3">''Unsouled'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Path of the White Fox]] produces [[madra]] that deceives senses, creates illusions, and twists light and sound.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c4">''Unsouled'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Path of the White Fox]] involves cultivating aspects of dreams and light for the purpose of deceiving enemies.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c5">''Unsouled'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Path of the White Fox]] is disorienting.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c6">''Unsouled'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|Those who follow the [[Path of the White Fox]] are stronger and better-trained than wild practitioners without large family support.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c9">''Unsouled'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Path of the White Fox]] is a path that Sairus follows.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c10">''Unsouled'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Path of the White Fox]] is a path that can be tampered with to affect perception.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c12">''Unsouled'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Lindon]] made a deal with the [[First Elder]] for a copy of the [[White Fox]] [[Path]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|Some in the [[Wei clan]] use goldsteel to gather light-aspect [[vital aura]] for training the [[Path of the White Fox]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c14">''Unsouled'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Path of the White Fox]] is a path that can be trained using the [[White Fox boundary formation]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[First Elder]] of the [[Wei clan]] is rumored to know the [[Ruler technique]] of the [[White Fox]] [[Path]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c17">''Unsouled'', chapter 17</ref>}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Path of the White Fox]] is one of the [[Paths]] [[Lindon]] considers.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c9">''Blackflame'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Path of the White Fox]] can craft illusions using [[Ruler techniques]] that affect the mind and eyes.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c11">''Blackflame'', chapter 11</ref>}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The [[Path of the White Fox]] is a path associated with certain flickers of [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c6">''Ghostwater'', chapter 6</ref>}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon]]'s illusory image was as flawless as a master of the [[Path of the White Fox]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c8">''Uncrowned'', chapter 8</ref>}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Path of the White Fox]] has a new [[Jade]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c28">''Wintersteel'', chapter 28</ref>}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Path of the White Fox]] is a path that Wei Shi [[Kelsa]] could have used to avoid capture.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c7">''Bloodline'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Path of the White Fox]] is an excellent method for sending messages within [[Sacred Valley]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c12">''Bloodline'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Path of the White Fox]] is a path [[Lindon]] can break down.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon]] felt the [[Path of the White Fox]] following him.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c22">''Bloodline'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Path of the White Fox]] is a path [[Seisha]] is studying.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c5">''Reaper'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Path of the White Fox]] is a path associated with [[Remnants]] in [[Sacred Valley]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c6">''Reaper'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Path of the White Fox]] is a path for practitioners of illusion techniques.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c11">''Reaper'', chapter 11</ref>}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]] could use dream bindings from the [[Path of the White Fox]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c4">''Dreadgod'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Path of the White Fox]] is a path members of the [[Twin Star Sect]] sought guidance on.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c15">''Dreadgod'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Fox Mirror]] is from the [[Path of the White Fox]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c16">''Dreadgod'', chapter 16</ref>}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Kelsa]] follows the [[Path of the White Fox]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c8">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Path of the White Fox]] is a path that includes the [[Foxtail]] [[Enforcer technique]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Path of the White Fox]] has an advantage in nighttime forest darkness.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c8" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
[[Category:Religion and cults]]
